about.title: About me
about.text: I am a Full Stack Developer and MCA student at IIIT Vadodara with a 9.0 GPA, previously completing my BCA from GGSIPU with a 9.2 GPA. My core stack spans React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind on the frontend, with Java Spring Boot and Node.js/Express on the backend, backed by PostgreSQL and MongoDB. I have internship experience in blockchain-focused software development using Solidity and Web3.js, and I am actively solving DSA problems with 200+ questions completed.
